title: Directory
description: A Directory (organization/synced) — the iPad 'zone'. What syncs is identity + nesting only ({id, name, parent_id}); geometry/paint is per-device layout and NEVER on the wire. Membership is the separate directory_membership edge. Canonical hub emission: DirectoryRecord.to_dict(). NOTE: web primitives.ts Directory carries a view-composed memberIds — that is an in-app join over membership edges, not a wire field.
